items.title: Visa (V) Increases Despite Market Slip: Here's What You Need to Know
items.description: The latest trading day saw Visa (V) settling at $346.2, representing a +1.81% change from its previous close.

items.title: Trump could flip ‘kill switch’ on payments in the West
items.description: Western countries fear that Donald Trump could flip a “kill switch” to disrupt payment systems as a means of pressuring allies, a former Bank of England top official has warned.

items.title: Affirm Expands BNPL Reach With ServiceTitan & Vagaro Partnerships
items.description: AFRM deepens its BNPL footprint with new ServiceTitan and Vagaro deals, expanding into home repairs, beauty, fitness and wellness services.

items.title: Can TTD's Strategies & Innovations Shield Stock in an Uncertain Market?
items.description: The Trade Desk drives growth with AI, key partnerships and new tools like OpenSincera and Deal Desk, targeting resilient ad performance amid volatility.
